hero.lede: I build real-time, full-stack and AI-powered products — live-streaming classrooms, collaborative whiteboards, 3D tooling and LLM features — across edtech, SaaS and hospitality.

bhanzu.summary: Architected a proprietary live-streaming classroom, a real-time collaborative whiteboard, RAG-powered learning features and the microfrontend platform behind them.

avataar.summary: Built 3D animation and rendering tooling on Three.js, with deep render-pipeline and frontend performance work.

stayflexi.summary: Led the Bidflexi booking engine, shipped a React Native POS, scaled PMS & OTA platforms to 1,000+ hotels and migrated the stack to Django.

shrohi.desc: A serverless ecommerce admin panel for a boutique, built and shipped end-to-end on AWS.

bhanzu.intro: Bhanzu's live classroom serves 50,000+ sessions a month. Here's the real-time infrastructure I built underneath it.

streaming.title: Live classroom that replaced Zoom
streaming.body: I replaced Zoom with a proprietary classroom on Amazon IVS — capturing video in the browser, compressing it into adaptive quality levels and delivering it at sub-second latency, cutting streaming cost ~50% across 50,000+ monthly sessions.
streaming.note: Like a TV station that automatically sends a lighter picture when your internet is slow, so class never freezes.

whiteboard.title: Real-time collaborative whiteboard
whiteboard.body: Every pen stroke becomes a tiny event broadcast over WebSockets and replayed on every screen, with an event log so latecomers can rebuild the board — lifting engagement ~30%.
whiteboard.note: The teacher writes once and it appears on every student's screen at the same moment.

backend.title: Layered Python backend
backend.body: I built the backend in Python, Flask and DynamoDB on a strict route → service → repository architecture, with access-pattern-first single-table design for fast reads at scale.
backend.note: Every request passes through clean layers, so the code stays easy to change as the product grows.

rag.title: RAG-grounded AI features
rag.body: Lesson summaries, adaptive quizzes and student feedback are grounded with Retrieval-Augmented Generation, so answers come from the real curriculum instead of the model's memory.
rag.note: The AI reads the actual lesson before answering, so it doesn't make things up.

microfrontend.title: Microfrontend platform
microfrontend.body: A host shell loads independently-deployed remotes — classroom, assignments, gamification — unified by a shared Storybook design system, so teams ship without colliding.
microfrontend.note: Different teams build different parts of the app and release them on their own schedule.

quality.title: Testing that guards releases
quality.body: Vitest unit tests and Playwright end-to-end tests run in CI, so a change can't ship unless it passes — cutting production issues ~50%.
quality.note: Robots click through the app before every release to catch bugs before users do.

avataar.intro: At Avataar I built the tools artists use to create 3D product assets — and made them fast.

tooling.title: 3D creation tooling
tooling.body: I built animation and rendering tools on Three.js + React Three Fiber that roughly halved asset-creation time.
tooling.note: React decides what the 3D scene should look like; Three.js and the GPU draw it.

perf.title: Render & frontend performance
perf.body: Through instancing, memoization and lazy loading I improved rendering and frontend performance 40–50%.
perf.note: Fewer, smarter draws mean a heavy 3D scene still feels smooth.

components.title: Reusable component architecture
components.body: I composed the editor from small reusable primitives instead of duplicating logic across features.
components.note: Build small Lego-like pieces once, then snap them together into features.

stayflexi.intro: Stayflexi runs hotels end-to-end. I worked across its booking engine, POS and core platform at scale.

bidflexi.title: Bidflexi booking engine
bidflexi.body: I led a dynamic engine where guests bid on rooms against live pricing rules that accept or counter — opening a new B2C channel.
bidflexi.note: Guests name their price and the system instantly decides whether to say yes.

pos.title: React Native POS
pos.body: I architected a cross-platform point-of-sale app from one TypeScript codebase, opening the restaurant vertical without separate iOS and Android teams.
pos.note: One codebase becomes both the iPhone and the Android app.

scale.title: Scaled to 1,000+ hotels
scale.body: I helped scale the PMS and OTA platforms to over 1,000 hotels, keeping inventory in sync across booking channels.
scale.note: One dashboard keeps a thousand hotels' rooms and prices correct everywhere they're sold.

migration.title: Jython → Django migration
migration.body: I migrated the platform off legacy Jython onto Django and code-split the frontend for ~75% faster loads.
migration.note: Swapped an aging engine for a modern one — without stopping the car.
